mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_leasing_lead WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_lead SET company_id = #{companyId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, customer_code = #{customerCode}, customer_type = #{customerType}, customer_name = #{customerName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, mobile_no = #{mobileNo}, email = #{email}, preferred_contact_method = #{preferredContactMethod}, purpose = #{purpose}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_lead SET status = 'QUALIFIED', qualification_score = #{score}, qualification_notes = #{notes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_lead SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
